subject: tieng-anh
topic: Đề thi thử cuối học kỳ 2 — Tiếng Anh 7 (bấm giờ)

questions.question: What does 'festival' mean? (Từ 'festival' nghĩa là gì?)
What is the English word for 'tắc đường'? ('tắc đường' tiếng Anh là gì?)
What is the past simple of 'see'? (Quá khứ đơn của 'see')
Complete: 'How ___ rice do you eat?' (rice không đếm được — điền 'much')
Match the kind of film with its meaning (Nối loại phim với nghĩa)
Choose the comparative: 'A train is ___ than a bicycle.' (nhanh hơn)
Complete: 'There isn't ___ milk left.' (điền từ đúng)

statements.text: A horror film makes you laugh happily.

questions.question: Write the past simple of 'visit' (Viết quá khứ đơn của 'visit'): ___
Which one is a kind of film? (Đâu là một loại phim?)
Choose the correct question about festivals (Chọn câu hỏi đúng về lễ hội)

questions.passage: Tet is the most important festival in Vietnam. During Tet, people clean their houses, make banh chung and visit relatives. Children receive lucky money.
questions.question: What is the most important festival in Vietnam? (Lễ hội quan trọng nhất ở Việt Nam là gì?)

questions.passage: Tet is the most important festival in Vietnam. During Tet, people clean their houses, make banh chung and visit relatives. Children receive lucky money.
questions.question: What do people make during Tet? (Người ta làm món gì trong dịp Tết?)

questions.passage: Tet is the most important festival in Vietnam. During Tet, people clean their houses, make banh chung and visit relatives. Children receive lucky money.
questions.question: What do children receive during Tet? (Trẻ em nhận được gì trong dịp Tết?)
Invite a friend to watch a film with you (Mời bạn cùng xem phim)
options: Would you like to watch a film with me?
Film you like with watch me?
